guidelines.dev: EDD — write behavioral evals before skill files. NFR: description ≤150 chars, model/effort frontmatter, body ≤500 lines.
guidelines.e2e-validator: Developer-confirmation checklist from 12 Gherkin scenarios in sprints/phase-3-sprint-execution/specs/agent-guidelines-skill.feature

agent-guidelines-skill.test_approach: EDD — behavioral evals verify discovery accuracy, rule structure, prohibition format, version pinning, AVFL invocation

guidelines.dev: EDD — 3 evals before touching skill files. NFR: SKILL.md ≤500 lines, framework.json changes must include corpus_only: true flag.
guidelines.e2e-validator: Developer-confirmation checklist from 12 Gherkin scenarios in sprints/phase-3-sprint-execution/specs/8-1-avfl-corpus-mode.feature
guidelines.architect-guard: Verify existing lens assignments unchanged. corpus_only: true prevents new dimensions in single-doc mode. Corpus prompt templates extend, not replace, existing templates.

8-1-avfl-corpus-mode.test_approach: EDD — 3 evals: corpus dimension activation, backward compatibility, fixer authority resolution

guidelines.dev: EDD — 3 evals before skill files. Phases 1,2,4,5,6 first; Phase 3 placeholder until 8-1 lands. Provenance: derives_from + content_origin in all output files.
guidelines.e2e-validator: Developer-confirmation checklist from 20 Gherkin scenarios in sprints/phase-3-sprint-execution/specs/8-2-momentum-research-skill.feature. Phase 3 scenarios deferred until 8-1 lands.

8-2-momentum-research-skill.test_approach: EDD — 3 evals: light profile end-to-end, medium profile with AVFL (deferred), resume support
8-2-momentum-research-skill.notes: Phase 3 (VERIFY) soft-depends on 8-1-avfl-corpus-mode; Phases 1,2,4,5,6 are independent
